project.title: Wasteland Survivors
project.description: Post-apocalyptic survival game set in ruined cities overtaken by mutated wildlife.
project.art_direction: gritty stylized 2D game art, muted desaturated palette with rust and toxic green accents, thick readable silhouettes

asset.name: raptor_scavenger
asset.description: mutated velociraptor scavenger with scarred scales, torn harness made of scrap metal, one cybernetic glowing green eye, sharp claws. FULL BODY including entire tail tip visible, centered on canvas with generous white margin on all sides (at least 15% padding), side view facing right

plan.prompt: Mutated velociraptor scavenger with scarred scales, torn scrap metal harness, and glowing green cybernetic eye. Full body side view facing right, sharp claws extended, long tail fully visible. Gritty stylized 2D art with thick readable silhouettes, muted desaturated colors with toxic green accents. Pure flat white background (#FFFFFF), uniform studio backdrop, no shadows, no environment. Clean silhouette centered with padding space.
negative_hints: Do not prompt for transparent background or checkerboard.
Do not include multiple characters or action frames.
Do not include borders, frames, vignettes, gradients, or textured backdrops.
Character sprite only — not a prison scene, not environmental background, not item icon.
No prison walls, bars, cells, floors, or scenery behind the character.
